docstrings.LogCounterHandler.emit: Increment the crawler stats for the specific level of the provided record.
docstrings.SpiderLoggerAdapter: A LoggerAdapter that provides a way to augment logs with extra data.
docstrings.StreamLogger.flush: Flush all handlers associated with the logger.
docstrings.StreamLogger.write: Write the provided buf to the logger by splitting it into lines.
docstrings.TopLevelFormatter.filter: Filter the record to ensure only top-level logger names are used.
docstrings.get_scrapy_root_handler: Return the current Scrapy root log handler.
docstrings.install_scrapy_root_handler: Install the Scrapy root logging handler based on the provided settings.
docstrings.log_reactor_info: Log information about the current Twisted reactor.
docstrings.log_scrapy_info: Log Scrapy version and software versions based on the provided settings.
